author: alex.vlasov
content:
Hey, I've generated fancier Gloas vectors, which include execution payload. I've uploaded to the same [place](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1WxbkVMYanvhPlJD6mpcvQKR98HbsZMQa). The test vectors use test format changes from [PR #4940](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/4940).
The files have `_execution_payload.tar` prefix. I keep several versions, in case somebody wants to run tests, while not supported the lates changes (not in `master` branch yet).
Will add `payload_attestation` next
